text:
ATHARV PATHAK
+91 8827273504 | atharvapathak025@gmail.com | LinkedIn | GitHub
SUMMARY
Data-focused IT student and aspiring Data Engineer with experience in Python, Pandas, NumPy, and SQL to build ETL 
pipelines, analyze large datasets, and support dashboarding. Familiar with Git and Linux, and actively developing skills in 
Tableau, Snowflake, and DevOps tools to deliver reliable, scalable data solutions.
SKILLS
• Programming Languages: Python, SQL, Java

SKILLS
• Programming Languages: Python, SQL, Java
• Machine Learning: Supervised & Unsupervised Learning (Regression, Classification, Clustering), Feature Engineering, 
Model Evaluation
• Data & Analytics: Pandas, NumPy, Data Cleaning, Exploratory Data Analysis, Data Visualization (Tableau, 
dashboards), Relational Databases (MySQL/PostgreSQL), ETL Pipelines, Snowflake (cloud data warehousing)

• Tools & Platforms: Git / GitHub, Linux, Jupyter Notebook, VS Code, Docker, GitHub Actions (CI/CD), Linux Shell 
Scripting, Tableau, Snowflake
WORK EXPERIENCE
Techonet Automation
May 2025 - Jul 2025
Data & Analytics Intern
• Performed data analysis on large structured datasets using Python (Pandas, NumPy) and SQL, extracting actionable 
insights to optimize performance and support data-driven decisions.

• Developed reusable ETL and data-processing scripts, integrating with relational databases to streamline data ingestion, 
transformation, and loading for analytics use cases.
• Assisted in building interactive dashboards and analytic visualizations in Tableau to monitor key metrics, investigate data 
anomalies, and present findings to stakeholders.
EDUCATION
Bhilai Institute of Technology Durg
Sep 2023 - Jul 2026
B.Tech, Computer Science and Engineering
Durg
Govt. Polytechnic Ambikapur

Durg
Govt. Polytechnic Ambikapur
Aug 2021 - Jun 2023
Diploma, Computer Science and Engineering
Ambikapur
PROJECTS
Real-Time Data Pipeline & DevOps Automation Platform | GitHub
• Designed and implemented a real-time data pipeline using Python, SQL, and Apache Airflow to ingest, transform, and 
load data into a centralized PostgreSQL data warehouse.
• Containerized pipeline components with Docker and orchestrated builds and deployments using GitHub Actions (CI/CD),

enabling automated testing and reliable production releases.
• Implemented logging, alerting, and dashboarding with Prometheus and Grafana to monitor pipeline performance, detect 
failures, and optimize resource utilization.
Flavor AI - Ingredient Based Recipe Recommendation Engine | GitHub
• Designed and implemented an AI-driven recommendation system that suggests recipes based on user-provided 
ingredients, showcasing end-to-end data pipeline design.

• Applied data preprocessing and feature engineering on ingredient and recipe datasets to standardize inputs, handle missing 
values, and improve recommendation accuracy.
• Optimized database queries and application logic to reduce response time and enable near real-time recipe suggestions, 
demonstrating robust data handling from user input to ranked recipe outputs.
EXTRA CURRICULAR
TEDxBITD
Head of Event Operations

TEDxBITD
Head of Event Operations
• Led event operations for TEDxBITD as Head of Event Operations, overseeing planning, coordination, and on-ground 
execution with a cross-functional organizing team.
